DiscoverStreamArtistsMarketplace

Artist setup

Artist workflows are being rebuilt for real release operations.

This route now reflects the new direction: storage-first uploads, backend-managed jobs, and Stellar-backed access rules.

Claim your artist account
One wallet identity, one server profile, one place to manage releases and rights.
Push masters to storage
Original files stay private while the backend prepares encrypted streaming outputs.
Control access policy
Use Stellar-backed entitlement checks for fan access, sales, subscriptions, and drops.
